seo_title: Membership Plans | Los Cab Sports Club — Fountain Valley, CA
seo_description: Join Los Cab Sports Club. Tennis, Pickleball, and Sports memberships starting at $115/month. Family plans available. Fountain Valley, CA.
hero_subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing — no hidden fees. Choose the plan that fits your sport and budget. Monthly billing available.

included_features.title: Gym Access
included_features.desc: Full access to our multi-level fitness center — cardio, free weights, and resistance machines.

included_features.title: Pool Access
included_features.desc: Use of the heated 50-meter Olympic pool at any time during facility hours.

included_features.title: Group Classes
included_features.desc: Unlimited group fitness classes — yoga, Pilates, HIIT, Barre, cycling, Fitdanz, and more.

included_features.title: Locker Rooms
included_features.desc: Full locker room access with showers, steam rooms, saunas, and the co-ed jacuzzi.

faq.question: How do I sign up?
faq.answer: Memberships are processed through Club Automation, our online membership management system. You can also visit us in person at 17272 Newhope St., Fountain Valley or call (714) 546-8560.

faq.question: Are there long-term contracts?
faq.answer: All memberships are billed monthly. There are no long-term contract requirements. An initiation fee applies when you first join. Contact us for cancellation terms.

faq.question: Can I try the club before joining?
faq.answer: Yes! Contact us at (714) 546-8560 or visit the club to arrange a tour and trial visit. Our membership team will walk you through all the facilities and programs available.

faq.question: Are group fitness classes included?
faq.answer: Yes — all group fitness classes (yoga, Pilates, HIIT, Barre, cycling, Fitdanz, line dancing, and more) are included with every Sports, Pickleball, and Tennis membership at no extra charge.

faq.question: Is personal training extra?
faq.answer: Personal training sessions with our certified trainers are available for an additional fee beyond your monthly membership. Contact the fitness team at fitness@loscab.com to schedule a session.

faq.question: Can children join?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer junior programs for tennis, pickleball, swimming (Nova Swim School), water polo, and more. Family add-on rates allow you to include dependents on your primary membership.
